programme.desc: Khloe Kardashian takes on the wings of death and discusses the tricks of reality TV, paparazzi evasion and her iconic Complex magazine cover.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Billie Eilish Freaks Out While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Billie Eilish is the hyper-talented singer/songwriter on platinum hit singles like Ocean Eyes and Lovely.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Rhett & Link Hiccup Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Comedy duo Rhett and Link are among the most requested "Hot Ones" guests of all time!

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Eddie Huang Seeks Revenge Against Spicy Wings
programme.desc: For his second showdown with the wings of death, Eddie Huang brings a different strategy to the table and talks about everything from Anthony Bourdain's mentorship to outrageous chef fashions. Welcome back to the hot seat, Eddie!

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Natalie Portman Pirouettes in Pain While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As the Scoville bombs rain down on her tongue, Portman discusses her beloved "SNL" rap performances, her Harvard days and why it's cool that Kanye used ballet dancers in his 'Runaway' music video.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Kieran Culkin Fires Sean While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Kieran Culkin is an Emmy-nominated actor you know as Roman Roy on the riveting HBO drama "Succession."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Scarlett Johansson Tries to Not Spoil "Avengers" While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: While attempting to jump kick the wings of death, Johansson learns about memes, talks about the best movie-set food and tries to avoid spoiling "Avengers: Endgame."

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Alton Brown Rigorously Reviews Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Alton sits down for his date with Sean and the wings of death. As he meticulously reorders the hot sauces to his own ranking, Alton tackles everything from the history of food TV to Eminem lyrics to the art of a bottle of champagne.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon and becomes a legend.

programme.title: Bachelor Night
programme.desc: When a bachelor party and a bachelorette party cross paths in Vegas, only the best man and maid of honor can save their friends from a night of epic “mistakes.”

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: Following a brush with death, James and Astrid realize they need to make a death plan, including finding legal guardians for Felix and Viv. Anna Hopkins guest stars.

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: Frustrated over their cluttered home full of kids' stuff, James and Astrid decide to purge.

programme.title: Count Arthur Strong
programme.desc: Count Arthur Strong, a faded star from the golden days of variety, gets an opportunity.

programme.title: Growing Up Smith
programme.desc: In 1979, an Indian family moves to America with hopes of living the American Dream. While their 10-year-old boy Smith falls head-over-heels for the girl next door, his desire to become a "good old boy" propels him further away from his family's ideals than ever before.

programme.title: Alison Spittle: Big
programme.desc: A man told Alison to sit down and now she's doing a whole stand up show about it. Appeared on House of Games, Celebrity Goggle Box and Pointless Celebrities. Podcast appearances on Off menu, The Gargle and Trusty Hogs.

programme.title: Influencer Stalked By Fan
programme.desc: A famous influencer's family is terrorized by an obsessed fan. Her husband, initially dismissive, realizes the danger. He bravely confronts the stalker, saving his family and highlighting that true strength lies in unity and protecting loved ones.

programme.title: Millionaire Falls For Homeless Girl
programme.desc: Blackmailed by greedy Demetrius to rob his brother Dominick, homeless Holly discovers Demetrius is the true villain. Dominick outsmarts him, clears Holly's name, and funds her sick mother's treatment.

programme.title: Girl Falls In Love With Fake Boyfriend
programme.desc: After Meredith is scammed of $1M by an AI catfish, she and her friends track the fraudster to New York. They "scam the scammer" to get the money back. Meredith wins as a journalist and finds true love.

programme.title: Toxic Friends Don't Know Friend Is Secretly Famous
programme.desc: After being bullied for his weight and mocked for his dream of stand-up, lawyer Jonah quits his job. Guided by comedian Lauren, he finds success and proves his toxic friends and ex-girlfriend wrong.

programme.title: Girl Is Dumped Then Becomes a Millionaire
programme.desc: After her fiancé Alex fires her and leaves her for her best friend, Hannah seeks revenge by teaming up with his estranged brother, Logan. She finds true success and love where she least expected it.

programme.title: Police Show Up at House at 2AM
programme.desc: After his "Frank the Prankster" persona ruins his personal life, Frank tries to frame Dhar Mann for a crime. However, Dhar outsmarts him with a "prank-back," ultimately rewarding Frank with a date.

programme.title: Genius Kid Is Expelled From School
programme.desc: Underestimated due to autism, Jayden uses his engineering genius to save his school from a major crisis. His mother's "white lie" about a cruel letter gives him the confidence to prove his true worth.

programme.title: A TikTok Prankster Goes Too Far
programme.desc: Frank "the Prankster" records his escalating pranks on classmates for TikTok fame, causing chaos and damage. When his biggest prank targets the principal, he's caught on camera by his victims. This leads to Frank facing consequences, ultimately apologizing, learning that actions have consequences.

programme.title: New Cool Kid Steals Shy Kid's Girl
programme.desc: Middle schooler Kyle's jealousy over new student Archie threatens his chance with crush Candace. Guided by his father Darrel, Kyle faces his insecurities. He apologizes, and both Kyle and his parents reconcile their relationships at the school dance.

programme.title: Teacher Secretly A Gaming Pro
programme.desc: Rob, a lazy gamer, faces expulsion. His science teacher, Mr. Brown, connects with him through Genshin Impact, motivating Rob to apply himself. Rob excels, creating a unique science fair project, winning back his girlfriend, and earning his parents' pride.

programme.title: Girl's Debt Magically Paid Off
programme.desc: Jenny, blaming bad luck for her misfortunes, is conned by her best friend, Savannah, pretending to be a fortune teller. Jenny's "curse" is lifted, motivating her to work hard and turn her life around, ultimately realizing her destiny is her own choice.

programme.title: Student Takes IQ Serum To Impress Girl

programme.title: Lightening Point S01 E02

programme.desc: When KIKI is moved to tears by AMBER's singing, AMBER makes an important discovery – Luminans can only experience emotions on Earth.

programme.title: Lightening Point S01 E11

programme.title: Lightening Point S01 E12

programme.title: Lightening Point S01 E13

programme.title: Lightening Point S01 E14

programme.title: Minutes With: Episode 139
programme.desc: Josh Lane bravely speaks out about his decade-long pornography addiction, revealing the most difficult moments he faced as a child discovering porn and as an adult who became dependent on it, and his ongoing journey of recovery.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Jack O'Connell joins us for a hilarious episode of Snack Wars, UK & Ireland v USA. The ever-charming Jack gives us a masterclass in the perfect Guinness pour, and settles the score on what he considers the top biscuit of all time.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, we sat down with Ulrich Larsen, who went undercover in North Korea to expose many crimes of the totalitarian regime, including an international arms deal.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode, ex-career criminal John Burton, a.k.a 'Juice Bomb John', recounts how he began a life of crime in the 90's Liverpool rave scene, smuggled millions of pounds worth of black market goods into the UK, and reformed to develop an app helping people find work after leaving the prison system.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week, we spoke to Nick Dunn, who was wrongly imprisoned in Indian jails for four years. Nick was part of a shipping crew defending his boat from Somali pirates in the Indian Ocean when a cyclone threat forced them to dock off the coast of India. After being arrested on false weapons charges, Nick and his crewmates spent four torturous years in 'hellish' conditions, facing abuse from the prisoners and prison officers.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: We sat down with Martin Hibbert, survivor of the Manchester Arena Bombing, which took place on 22 May 2017. He tells us about the moment when the bomb detonated, what happened afterwards and how that event forever changed his life…

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: English physicist Professor Brian Cox explains to us what would happen if you jumped into a black hole, his favourite planet in the universe and how the Earth will be destroyed (don't worry, this won't happen for about 5 billion years).

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Carlos ‘Carlitos' Páez Rodriguez, a survivor of the 1972 Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571 plane crash in the Andes, discusses the plane crashing at an altitude of 11,170 feet and the resulting 72 days surviving extreme cold, avalanches and starvation.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Two four-year-old children, Cooper and Millie, take part in Snack Wars: Kids, as the pair of youngsters taste some foods they've never tried before! The little ones tackle olives from Italy, mochi from Japan and Takis from Mexico. Six-year-old twins, Naushi and Neave, try some brand-new snacks from around the world in this fun episode of Snack Wars: Kids! From freaking out over Twiglets, to getting terrified of guacamole, this is an episode of you don't want to miss.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: England rugby stars Owen Farrell, Maro Itoje and Jamie George take on Snack Wars, tasting British classics against global flavours. From Tottenham cake to jellied eels, expect banter, honest reactions and a wild food showdown.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.12

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.14
programme.desc: Daniel finally finds the younger sister he has been searching for, and Gun is crestfallen to hear Mi Young plans to return to France. programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.15
programme.desc: Chairwoman Wang sounds Mi Young out about reconciling with Gun, but Mi Young is resolute. programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.16
programme.desc: Gun provides wholehearted support for the collaboration, while Mi Young grows uncomfortable with his constant presence at her side. Se Ra becomes increasingly uneasy about Mi Young's return.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.1
programme.desc: The arrival of Private Park Min-seok, the ultimate "military royalty" recruit! A shocking truth is revealed to the members of the 1st Squad, who were in the middle of enjoying their usual hazing of the new private. While the 1st Squad suddenly finds themselves facing an uphill battle, the recruit Park Min-seok keeps causing disasters like a total liability, making everyone doubt if he's actually a privileged recruit. A major storm seems to be brewing in the once "peaceful(?)" Shinhwa Unit.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.2
programme.desc: A combat uniform inspection on a rainy day?! With the company in a desperate crisis, will Private Park Min-seok's attempt to pull strings with his father be the ultimate salvation? Meanwhile, what fate awaits the members of the 3rd Squad as they endure a perilous bedtime?

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.3
programme.desc: Our squad is in danger! The senior soldiers are out for blood, and a secret mission begins to train the clueless total liability, Park Min-seok. It's the First Sergeant vs. the Second Lieutenant! What fate lies in store for the overly passionate platoon leader?! The "flower" of military life—manual labor! While painting, Private First Class Kim Dong-woo finds a single live round in his hand... Holding the ammunition, Dong-woo's mind begins to spiral into a deep, dark turmoil.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.4
programme.desc: Kim Kyung-tae pulls Dong-woo back from the brink at a life-or-death moment. However, Kang Chan-seok catches them in the act, and an even more dangerous situation seems imminent. Meanwhile, a sudden barracks inspection is called—a sinister scheme orchestrated by someone. Why on earth did a live round turn up there?

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.5
programme.desc: Park Min-seok inadvertently thwarts Chan-seok's plan using his father's influence, but his heart only grows heavier. That night, a "discharge bread(?)" ritual is held for the "toothless tiger," Sergeant Shim Jin-woo, who is about to be discharged—revealing the untold story of his glory days as a top-tier soldier! As time passes, Park Min-seok slowly evolves into a first-rate soldier. While he is away on his first reward leave, a brand-new recruit makes his appearance...

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.6
programme.desc: With the arrival of the elite new recruit Cha Byeong-ho, Park Min-seok's status takes a pitiful, miserable plunge. Seizing the opportunity to redeem himself, Park targets the upcoming counter-infiltration drill. When a suspicious intruder suddenly appears before him, Park Min-seok throws himself into a desperate struggle to make the catch.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.7
programme.desc: A transfer order is issued to Park Min-seok. Will he follow his father's demands and move to another unit? Or will he choose to stay and complete his service without further trouble? Meanwhile, the new villain, Seong Yun-mo, puts Kang Chan-seok in jeopardy with a formal grievance letter. In a fit of rage, Chan-seok directs his explosive anger toward the innocent Dong-woo...

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.8

This leads to a major crisis for the 1st Squad! Is the new soldier being traded for the ace, Cha Byeong-ho, really Seong Yun-mo?! programme.title: New Recruit Ep.9

programme.title: El Chapo & Sean Penn: Bungle in the Jungle
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look inside the ill-fated rendezvous with Sean Penn, El Chapo and actress Kate Del Castillo. El Chapo, the most wanted, most dangerous and richest drug lord in the world, agreed to meet Penn in the remote mountains of Sinaloa state to grant the first and only interview since he escaped from Mexico's number one security prison. For the first time, cameras go inside that rendezvous and reveal the true story of what happened behind the scenes, who orchestrated the meeting, the identities of the two mystery men travelling with Penn and the secret Hollywood figure who's really pulling strings, with a $6 million offer for El Chapo's life story rights. What was the real reason that Sean Penn took this risky and reckless journey? What was the real motive for the actress Kate Del Castillo to set up a meeting that could have led to both their deaths? And what were the secret texts between El Chapo and Kate, long before the day of the 'Bungle In The Jungle'?

programme.title: Hitler's Displaced War Children

programme.title: Hitler's Displaced War Children

programme.title: Gold for Kim
programme.sub-title: A Life for North Korea's Leader
programme.desc: North Korea is a country of stark contrasts. On the one hand, it presents real socialist stereotypes like cryptic messages from a frozen time loop, combined with shocking reports on shortages. On the other hand, polished Pyongyang lures with a futuristic skyline, flashy amusement parks and department stores with a range of goods equal to those in western consumer meccas.

programme.title: Signs of Evil
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS, Hitler's Schutzstaffel, stands for terror and the murder of millions. The penniless graphic artist Walter Heck was given the job of designing the jagged, rune-like characters in 1929. The “sig” rune was rooted deep in the ideological cosmos of the Nazis and their supporters. They saw themselves as the descendants of the Teutons and declared the runes to be humanity's original Germanic script. The symbol was meant to unite Heinrich Himmler's “Black Order.” But did it escape their notice that it was originally of Semitic origin? In October 1945, the Allies passed a law banning the Nazi Party and all associated organizations, including the SS. The young Federal Republic even forbade all Nazi symbols. This documentary tells the gripping story of the SS symbol, from the Middle Ages to the present day.

programme.title: Mata Hari
programme.desc: In February 1917 World War I is raging when Mata Hari is arrested in Paris and taken to the examining magistrate. Her very life is at stake: she is accused of high treason. The famous exotic dancer has come to represent beauty and the power of feminine seduction. The documentary Mata Hari - the Beautiful Spy tracks down the true story of this fascinating woman.

programme.title: The Child Crusades
programme.desc: In Cologne in 1212 a boy named Nicholas captivated thousands of children between the ages of eight and fifteen with his fanatical speeches. They had been chosen, he said, to liberate Jerusalem. Likewise, in the French town of Cloyes a young shepherd gathered numerous children around him with the same proclamation.

programme.desc: During an exercise, a Staff Sergeant encounters a shadowy figure with long dark hair. She attacks him, then disappears. In one of Saddam Hussein's former torture houses, US Marine James Gelston hears horrifying screams. Who or what did he hear?

programme.desc: In Afghanistan, Lance Corporal Jose Herrera encounters death scents, orbs of light, and unease beyond the normal stress of war. In CA, Auburn White's colleague's eyes turn black, she levitates after falling asleep, and they all seek answers.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: This metal sphere is just seven hundredths of an inch across, no bigger than the head of a pin. Yet under extreme magnification it shows two holes that have been precision drilled through it. Each one is just four times the width of a human hair.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: 150 years ago a strange set of objects are found in the Great Pyramid at Giza. A piece of cedar wood with regular marks etched along its length, a two-pronged bronze hook with two pins sticking into it, and a baseball-sized sphere made of granite.

programme.title: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to a vast location for a Most Haunted first. The owners of Belan Fort called the team in for its' first ever paranormal investigation into the many hauntings experienced over the years. Almost as soon as they get there something makes itself known, and one of the team gets scared out of their wits.

programme.title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Dangers of EMF (Electro Magnetic Frequencies)
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: Past Life Regression

programme.title: Bible Codes
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.desc: Elite killers like Utahraptor and Tyrannosaurus are studied using CAT scans.

programme.title: S1 E1 Black Blizzard
programme.desc: Experience 1930-1940 U.S. history with recreated black blizzards.

programme.title: S1 E1 First Apocalypse
programme.desc: Clues to human extinction found in Dinosaur's apocalypse.

programme.title: S1 E1 10.0 Megaquake

programme.title: S1 E7 Biggest Killers
programme.desc: Elite killers like Utahraptor and Tyrannosaurus are studied using CAT scans.

programme.title: Extinction! Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: Extinction, a daunting and confusing word. A force of nature, that sees the end of species, but also heralds the birth of others. Right now the extinction rate could be as much as 10,000 times faster than it should be. 20% of fish, a fifth of all reptiles and a quarter of mammals face extinction. If we are to do anything to stem the tide of extinction we must understand the lifestyles of those in danger. The future for countless animals is uncertain, but one thing is for sure – we have a lot to learn.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This episode is about on the most ancient and majestic animal of the continent: the muskox seems like the last survivor of the ice age – and it is. Thousands of years ago the animals roamed our landscapes together with mammoths. Nowadays, the only remaining herds live in Scandinavia: the Dovrefjell National Park in Norway and the Härjedaalen area in Sweden - where scientists and environmentalists put up a breeding centre in order to protect and strengthen the wild population of muskox - are the main locations of this episode.

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: This episode introduces a rare inhabitant of the mediterranean mountains: The mouflon sheep origin in Corsica and Sardinia, as well as on Cyprus.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Delarey drives through first thing in the morning to the Kruger Park to take slides to an Anthrax expert. Is it Anthrax?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: There is much confusion as to where the rhino has fallen. The vehicle carrying the experienced vet breaks down. Dr. Greg is delayed and unable to reach the rhino. How will the students manage without him and the more experienced team?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Kavinga where Kristina and Andy have more interactions with Juno, the resident lion king. A late drive leads them to the predators of the night. They come across a lion eating a porcupine and Morgan the elephant decides to join them at the bar with a weakness for lemons!

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina is back with Sean and hosted at the Hide Safari Camp in Hwange National Park at their driest period. A night drive leads them to a unique finding. They discover an unexpected leopard kill and spend time with a hungry pride as they study the menu. Find out if the lion's order comes through.

programme.title: Animal Record Breakers
programme.desc: We love to measure aspects of life at its extremes. The biggest, the tallest, even the rarest – some of the most iconic creatures in the natural world. Many are familiar but it's also important to recognise some of the more surprising record breakers.

programme.title: Extinction! Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: Extinction, a daunting and confusing word. A force of nature, that sees the end of species, but also heralds the birth of others. Right now the extinction rate could be as much as 10,000 times faster than it should be. 20% of fish, a fifth of all reptiles and a quarter of mammals face extinction. If we are to do anything to stem the tide of extinction we must understand the lifestyles of those in danger. The future for countless animals is uncertain, but one thing is for sure – we have a lot to learn.

programme.title: Wild Pacific
programme.desc: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions. It extends from the Arctic Ocean in the north to the Southern Ocean.

programme.title: Symphony of the Seas
programme.desc: Our journeys take us all around the world from Patagonia to the USA, from Greenland to South Africa and from Cambodia to Australia and leads us to the most fascinating places where landscapes animals and humans are the main focus of our documentaries. Whether on land or at sea – the last paradises of the world are our destination.

programme.title: Fair Trade
programme.sub-title: Cocoa From Ivory Coast (On the Road With Hannes Jaenicke)
programme.desc: Many everyday life goods get to us from all over the world. Even though they have crossed thousands of miles, their prices are shockingly low. On almost every occasion, this counts in to the disadvantage of the producers. While global players make gigantic profits, the farmers stay poor. Meanwhile, an alternative to this scenario does exist: Goods and products derived from fair trade. In Germany, labels like FAIRTRADE, GEPA, STEP or NATURLAND FAIR make the promise of trading while being aware of both sides of the production line. But can we really change things by our personal shopping tendencies only? Do we as consumers hold the power to change consumption for the better? The actor and author of bestseller books Hannes Jaenicke makes it his goal to find out exactly about these questions. In a journey around the globe, he visits various small farmers and producers who sell their products via fair trade. They show him how they live and work. What kind of people are they? And what has changed for them by getting organized in fair trade unions?

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: The Bohemian Forest is the source of the Vltava River, home to primeval forests, untouched high moors and bubbling torrents. This archaic stretch of land, which includes the Bavarian Forest, was long considered impenetrable and mysterious. Since the fall of the Iron Curtain, Bavarian border residents have rediscovered new references to this unusual forest landscape for themselves. This is also the case with photo artist Bastian Kalous, who has been documenting his homeland for years with nostalgic-looking Polaroid photographs and is dealing with its eventful history for an illustrated book. Or Elisa Belotti and Marco Heurich, who have dedicated their lives to the lynxes. In order for Europe's largest wild cat to survive in the Bohemian Forest, the lynx researchers fight for every single animal. Iryna Rudenko came to Zwiesel from Ukraine out of a passion for glass as a material to study at the glass school. After graduation, she would like to stay in Bavaria, Anna Hones grew up in Horská Kvilda, the smallest and highest village in the Czech Republic. The village lies just under 1100 meters above sea level, directly on the former border. The farmer, who experienced communism, the fall of the Iron Curtain and the subsequent changes, is now trying to find ways of surviving in this barren region with her children.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.title: Wild Slovakia
programme.desc: Brown bears, wolves, lynx, eagles… where within the European Union are these carnivores still regular inhabitants? Where can you find mountainous regions that yet wait to be discovered by mass tourism?

programme.title: Spectacular wildlife in the forests around the globe
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work. Its plants need water and a specific range of temperature. And still, it can be found in the most variable places of the world. But how does it manage to adapt to the most adverse condition and still thrive? “Forests of this earth” uncovers the forest's amazing strategies of survival, the strange phenomena that allow them to strive in varied biotopes and under different environmental conditions, and the interplay they have with the fascinating animals living in them.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: All over the world men and women fight for the protection of nature reserves and endangered species. This is their story, a story of bravery and stamina. We visit scientists in Central Europe who monitor the offspring of the rare lynx nearly 200 years after these elusive cats were extinct in the wild. We follow the work of the moose detective in Sweden on the island of Oland who tries to solve the riddle of increasing numbers of dead moose calves. In the heart of Africa one woman and her guards try to protect rare lowland gorillas and forest elephants but the increasing bush meat trade and the ongoing ivory smuggling makes their work extremely dangerous. Last but not least we meet US conservationists who rescue manatees in Florida - they have all dedicated their life to make a change. Without their work our world would be poorer.

programme.title: Amazing Iran
programme.desc: For the Iranian Turkmen a wedding is one of most important social events in their culture and is still celebrated according to old nomadic tradition. The Turkmen Steppe, the country of a thousand mountains, is a tribute to the hidden treasure that is Iran. Home to a proud nation with a majestic history, we show the freedom of a nomadic life, encounter the wild nature of the people and discover old traditions like the Turkmen wedding. Breathtaking sceneries create a mysticism that transports viewers into the realm of divinity while exposing a world caught between tradition and modernity - nomadism and sedentarism. Weddings in Iran are primarily arrangements between families and the product of lengthy negotiations. Even though many customs are purely symbolic, they still reflect the great significance as a rite of transition for the newlyweds and their families. The life of the Turkmen housewife revolves around weddings – first her own, later those of her children. Raising healthy, capable daughters and sons searching for possible partners mediating contact negotiating each betrothal with the family of the intended shouldering the wedding arrangements and the observance of customs and traditions – the responsibility for all of that falls to the mother. Though the Turkmen daughters and sons of today do insist on having their say, love, affection, trust and the like are still not the decisive criteria in making a match. The main consideration is not the subjective happiness of the couple but the happiness, stability and honor of each of their families as a whole. So it is still not uncommon for the bride and groom to be virtual strangers on their wedding day. The nuptials as a ritual of transition mark a series of profound changes – especially in the life of the bride. Once married, she leaves her family and her home village to take her new place within the family of the groom.

programme.title: Amazing Isfahan
programme.sub-title: Paradise in the Heart of Iran
programme.desc: Take a look at this natural beauty. Isfahan – the Florence of Persia, the blue pearl of Iran. The city in the heart of Iran is the most charismatic city in the country and often uttered in the same breath as Bagdad, Constantinople or Cairo. The former capital of the Persian Safavid Empire has long since lost the status of cosmopolitan city, but it still radiates a cosmopolitan charm of which the inhabitants are extremely proud. With its Iranian and Persian national consciousness, Isfahan emits a form of comeliness that attracts people near and far. Following the 30-year-old carpet dealer Shanty as he tries to establish a business for himself and his fiancée Nina, we discover the soul of the city with mesmeric shots, intimate portraits and true to life portrayals of daily life. For 120 years his family has been dealing with noble Persian carpets, but Shanty dreams of a modern coffee shop, driven by a youthful eagerness to experiment and with passion for the new. In the cozy little espresso bar on the city's famous Imam Square Shanty's barista conjures up the best créma in Isfahan while Pink Floyd, The Grateful Death and Led Zeppelin boom from the loudspeakers nothing new in Berlin or Paris but almost revolutionary here. In intimate pictures, we accompany the youngest son of an old Isfahan family through his bulging everyday life and see how many young Iranians try to unite the culture and traditions of their country with the present.

programme.desc: Iranian musician Hamid embarks on a journey through Hormozgan to unite black artists for a concert.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies want to go to sleep, but Tinky Winky finds Po already asleep in his bed. So he goes to look for somewhere else to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep when a voice trumpet appears singing the rhyme 'Frére Jacques'. The Teletubbies laugh and call "Again, again!"

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the Teletubbies laugh. They watch some children exploring the colour green. The Teletubbies love green.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.
