programme.desc: Cranky creates a youth potion, so he can take care of the Crystal Coconut himself. Donkey Kong accidentally drinks it, making him become a baby ape.

programme.title: SONIC X Cracking Knuckless
programme.desc: After Eggman tricks Knuckles into blaming Sonic for being stuck in the human world, Knuckles challenges Sonic to a duel! But Knuckles realizes he's being duped and teams up with Sonic to destroy the robot and save the others.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: On their way back to Pallet Town, our heroes encounter a runaway Mr. Mime.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: At a fork in the road, our heroes decide to climb a snowy mountain.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The K-9 Capers
programme.desc: Pikachu joins a training class for Growlithe that work with the police.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends meet Todd, a photographer who wants to get a picture of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and Team Rocket attempt a tough test to gain entry to the Pokémon League.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes encounter Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket—Jessie and James's rivals.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Misty and Jessie compete to become queen of the Princess Festival.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: It's Kids Day, and Ash and friends help some schoolchildren celebrate.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Cinnabar Island, where Ash hopes to win the Volcano Badge.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash has to rely on his misbehaving Charizard for his Gym battle against Blaine

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends help a group of wild Squirtle, Wartortle, and Blastoise.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Misty's sisters plan an exciting underwater ballet at the Cerulean City Gym.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves mixed up in an encounter that's out of this world.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash arrives at the Viridian City Gym just as Gary loses to an unknown Pokémon.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Craig loses his low-wage job. He heads to a bar and encounters an old friend. The two are roped into a round of drinks by a wealthy couple who engages them in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but how far are they willing to go for money?

programme.title: Gatlopp: Hell of a Game
programme.desc: Jumanji meets Escape Room. It's going to be one hell of a game. Four friends reunite for game night to forget the trauma of adult life. With mischief, booze and mayhem on the cards, are they playing the game or is the game playing them?

programme.title: Ceremony
programme.desc: Entertaining romantic comedy about a young man who crashes the wedding of an older woman (Uma Thurman) he still loves.

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: On a quaint, family-owned farm, a giant turkey flock lives a quiet, corn-stuffed life. All everyone cares about is feeding time and grazing in the sun and being in “Turkey Paradise.” Everyone, that is, except for Reggie, a whipsmart turkey who is an outcast among his flock.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Impy's Wonderland
programme.desc: Impy the friendly little dinosaur and his friends join together in order to rescue their new baby panda.

programme.title: Stratton
programme.desc: (2017) Action thriller starring Dominic Cooper. A rogue Russian operative plots to unleash deadly biochemical weapons. Special Boat Service commando John Stratton is sent in to hunt him down.

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: (2017) Action-packed western with Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel. Loyalty and friendship are tested when an ageing gunslinger sets out to avenge his murdered friend.

programme.title: Bunraku
programme.desc: (2010) Martial arts action with Josh Hartnett and Woody Harrelson. A mysterious drifter, a bartender and a young samurai join up against a ruthless leader and deadly assassins.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: (1967) WWII spy thriller with Christopher Plummer. Loosely based on a true story, bank robber Eddie Chapman gets entangled in spying for both sides during World War Two, becoming a triple agent.

programme.title: Only the Brave
programme.desc: All men are created equal… then, a few become firefighters. Only the Brave, based on the true story of the Granite Mountain Hotshots, is the heroic story of one unit of local firefighters that through hope, determination, sacrifice, and the drive to protect families...

programme.title: The Flowers Of War
programme.desc: An American, trapped amidst the Japanese invasion of Nanking in 1937, seeks refuge in a church with a group of schoolchildren and courtesans.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Nick Wild (Jason Statham) is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is beaten by a sadistic thug, Nick strikes back, only to find out the thug is the son of a powerful mob boss.

programme.title: Notorious
programme.desc: The daughter of a convicted German spy is asked by American agents to gather information on a ring of German scientists in South America. How far will she have to go to ingratiate herself with them?

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: A woman looks back at the past nineteen men she's had relationships with in her life and wonders if one of them might be her one true love.

programme.title: There Was a Crooked Man
programme.desc: A charming but totally ruthless criminal is sent to a remote Arizona prison. He enlists the help of his cellmates in an escape attempt with the promise of sharing his hidden loot.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel is busy trying to grow his empire, while a poor Jewish barber is doing everything he can to dodge persecution from Hynkel's rule.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Mads Mikkelsen stars as a pilot whose plane has crashed in a remote corner of the Arctic. Stranded in the wilderness he uses his ingenuity to survive. But he is forced to make a perilous choice between the safety of his camp and a trek into the unknown.

programme.title: Speak
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Kristen Stewart stars in this drama based on the award-winning novel about a teenager traumatized into silence after a disastrous summer party.

programme.title: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: In The Butterfly Effect Evan Treborn (Ashton Kutcher) has lost crucial moments of his life, his childhood scarred by a series of terrifying events he can't remember. When Evan realises that by reading his diaries he can unlock the past and go back in time, he tries to reclaim the missing memories by tampering with the past... with unexpected and disastrous results! The more Evan tampers with time, the more his life - and that of his friend Kayleigh (Amy Smart) - begin to unravel, and he discovers there is no such thing as a happy ending!

programme.title: We Still Kill The Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: When retired East End villain Charlie Archer is murdered by a feral street gang, his brother Ritchie returns to London from Spain to investigate. With the police investigation drawing blank after blank, Ritchie decides to take the law into his own hands and bring his old school justice back to the streets of East London. Rounding up his old firm, he leads a vigilante crusade against the vicious young criminals, using every grizzly method at his disposal to find and punish his brother's killers. They're outgunned and outnumbered, but this firm has never been outclassed yet!

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: In 1978, one film changed the face of cinema forever. Long established as one of the most debated and divisive movies of all time, I Spit On Your Grave has been condemned by some as 'vile and depraved', whilst others hail it as a 'misunderstood masterpiece of cinema', 'the ultimate feminist movie'. Re-experience the phenomenon that shocked and divided the world, and influenced an entire genre and generation of film-makers, with Camille Keaton's portrayal of young writer Jennifer Hills, her horrific plans for revenge, and some of the most gruesomely, unforgettable scenes ever captured to film.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Imperium
programme.desc: Daniel Radcliffe (Harry Potter) plays Nate, a young FBI agent who goes undercover to expose a radical white supremacy terrorist group. Under a new identity and immersed in a deeply unsettling, hate-filled world, Nate must control his own beliefs whilst identifying the threat and keeping his true motives a secret. Inspired by true events, this compelling story also stars Toni Collette (Hereditary).

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn't about to let a witness be murdered on his watch. When he's assigned to escort a petty criminal to testify before the grand jury, a violent turn of events means this down-and-out cop needs to pull it together as he is hunted across New York City.

programme.title: White Mountain
programme.desc: This jaw-dropping climbing, Free Solo-esque documentary is a harrowing story of friendship, bravery and tragedy in one of the harshest environments known to man. 6 years after their trip to Dhaulagiri in the Himalayas to reach the peak of the almost mythical and rarely-climbed white wall, a group of Argentine climbers return to get closure on a fellow climber who was never to be seen again.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Rock-a-doodle
programme.desc: An iconic family favourite from legendary director Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Oscar Winner Christopher Plummer. A contemporary take on the classic fish-out-of-water story as a rooster, who is tricked in to leaving town to seek fame as an Elvis-style Las Vegas singer, teams up with a young boy and a group of barnyard animals on a magical journey to defeat the Grand Duke of Owls.

programme.title: Love On Repeat
programme.desc: When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realizes she is stuck in limbo and must finally decide what it will take to make her truly happy. Starring Jen Lilley (2019)

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: (2023) Witty romantic comedy starring Katie McCarty. A reality TV show fakes a marriage to boost its ratings, but when off-screen sparks start to fly, love flips the script for real.

programme.title: Love, For Real
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Chloe Bridges. Best friends Hayley and Bree go on a dating show to publicize her fashion brand. But with love, friendship and careers on the line it could all go wrong.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, decorated New Jersey detective Laurel Hester (Julianne Moore) wishes to leave her pension benefits to domestic partner Stacie Andree (Elliot Page).

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: With an all-star cast led by Robert DeNiro, Katherine Heigl, Diane Keaton, Amanda Seyfried with Susan Sarandon and Robin Williams, THE BIG WEDDING is an romantic comedy about a charmingly modern family trying to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a family fiasco.

programme.title: Ophelia
programme.desc: A dynamic and lavish re-imagining of Shakespeare's 'Hamlet' starring Daisy Ridley, Naomi Watts and Clive Owen.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Game Of Love
programme.desc: Ex-Wife Frances conspires with her grown children to force Jake to sell his cherished Seattle basketball team. Will game changing moves off the court help reignite romantic sparks?

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away.

programme.title: Royal Runaways
programme.desc: A prince doesn't want to become King after his father dies, so he hides at a winery as a handyman to follow his own path.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage counselor attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: A Love To Remember
programme.desc: Tenley, a horticulturist, works up the courage to meet her online crush, Jared. Tenley gets mistaken for Jared's wife and is forced to keep the lie up with Jared's family and his charming best friend, Everett, in order to save their company.

programme.title: A Nashville Wish
programme.desc: A young country singer dreams of making it big in Nashville and begins dating a popular cheerleader, but she doesn't share his love of music. When his career takes off, he must choose between love and following your destiny no matter what.

programme.title: The Shunning
programme.desc: All her life Katie Lapp has longed for the forbidden things, but will her dreams come at a price too dear to pay? Why would Katie's mother, a plain and simple Amish-woman who embraces the old ways, hide a beautiful satin baby dress in the attic? The staggering answers come on the eve of Katie's wedding to widower, Bishop John Beiler, with the arrival of a beautiful “Englisher” woman who has been searching for her, throwing Katie's life – present and future – into confusion.

programme.title: The Stranger She Brought Home
programme.desc: Amelia, a 911 Operator, feigns being a comatose patient's fiancé .

programme.title: Betrayed by a Lover
programme.desc: Christine Carter's 7-year perfect marriage ended with Nicholas Francisco's exit.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Home, Not Alone
programme.desc: Strange occurrences start happening and Sara can't help but feel danger is coming.

programme.title: The Stranger She Brought Home
programme.desc: Amelia, a 911 Operator, feigns being a comatose patient's fiancé .

programme.title: The Love Club
programme.desc: Engaged Nicole wonders if her true love is actually her mystery college pen pal, and asks her friends to help.

programme.title: The Love Club
programme.desc: When Sydney reconnects with her ex and joins a Half Marathon he is running, she asks the Love Club to help.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki finds a necromancer and his assistant using dead athletes for a hideous underground sporting event.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: Eat, Drink and be Married
programme.desc: Billie helps save a wedding—and maybe finds love herself—in this charming romantic twist!

programme.title: The Perfect Stalker
programme.desc: When Grace becomes obsessed with her neighbor she invents an imaginary stalker to help get him to protect her.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Feared bounty hunter Lazar arrives in a gold-mining town to blackmail ex-bandit Barrett, now a ruthless mine owner. Followed by a young gunfighter with his own motive, Lazar forges an uneasy alliance. But as tensions rise, it becomes clear that not everyone is after gold—some seek justice, others revenge.

programme.title: The Grand Duel
programme.desc: A grizzled ex-sheriff helps a man framed for murder to confront the powerful trio of brothers who want him dead.

programme.title: 10,000 Dollars for a Massacre
programme.desc: 10,000 Dollars for a Massacre - Django has become a bounty hunter who is asked to chase a villain who has kidnapped a young girl.

programme.title: In Old New Mexico
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid and Pancho kidnap Ellen Roth, a woman accused of murder, and take her to a mission. She claims her innocence, revealing a mysterious doctor who caused a death. Cisco believes her and plans to expose the truth. He strikes a deal with Bill Hastings for part of an inheritance, but the stakes rise when a new plot unfolds.

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for members of an outlaw gang, are relentlessly pursued by a posse.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: One little slip destroys Brian's schedule turning one of the most important days of his life into a disaster.

programme.title: Life Is a Circus
programme.desc: The Crazy Gang have been jacks-of-all-trade with Joe Winter's Monster Circus for almost as long as Joe has been on the road. They are always hoping to be 'discovered', but Joe is fighting a losing battle to keep in business. With his equipment mortgaged, most of his acts have deserted him, and even the elephants have walked out. And so the Crazy Gang set about finding a way to save the circus and come up with a very unusual solution!

programme.title: R.A.F.
programme.desc: Film about life in the British Royal Air Force.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: A public hangman presumed dead returns to a life filled with dark secrets and twists.

programme.title: Hidden Homicide
programme.desc: A novelist faces a murder charge after he wakes in a county cottage with a gun in his hand.

programme.title: This Sporting Life
programme.desc: Richard Harris gives a great performance as a man who wants to quit his job as a miner.

programme.title: My New Partner
programme.desc: Young-Joon is a lieutenant working for the Internal Investigation Bureau Now he's given the most fateful mission ever to join an investigation team whose chief is Min- Ho, his estranged father whom Young-Joon hates more than anyone on earth. How will they come up with a way to round up the gang?

programme.title: 100 Days With Mr. Arrogant
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about Ha-young, a high school girl who ends up having to pay 3 million won in repair costs after kicking a car, and the events that unfold when she enters into a “100-day servant contract” with Hyung-jun, a rude college student.

programme.title: Her Thirteenth Month
programme.desc: Wanting to escape her mother, who had changed after her divorce, Yeo-kyung began her first relationship with Seong-jin, whom she met in college, and they married during her senior year. However, having no understanding of what love or a relationship with a man entailed, Yeo-kyung became overly possessive of her relationship with Seong-jin, causing friction between them, and was eventually abandoned by him. Several years later, Yeo-kyung, who had taken a job as an adjunct lecturer, learns that her ex-husband, Seong-jin, has been appointed to the same university. She steels herself against the temptation to waver. One day, while visiting the on-campus shoe repair shop to have her heels fixed, Yeo-kyung meets Woo-cheol, the shoemaker. Woo-cheol was supporting his family while caring for his father, who had suffered a stroke. When Woo-cheol's shoe repair shop faced the threat of demolition, Yeo-kyung persuaded the president of the academic society to help save it. As they came to understand each other's circumstances through this process, the two gradually grew closer…

programme.title: Under Your Bed
programme.desc: Ji-hoon comes alive only when he sees Ye-eun at college. After a long time, he desires to see her once more. Unfortunately, she has lost her vivacity after marrying her abusive husband, Hyung-oh. Ji-hoon hides under both their noses to rescue her from her suffering.

programme.title: Idol
programme.desc: A car accident triggered everything. The secret is bound to connect two men's lives in a harrowing way.

programme.title: My Punch-Drunk Boxer
programme.desc: A former professional boxer who has been diagnosed with punch-drunk syndrome tries to revive his boxing career.

programme.title: Ten Months
programme.desc: Mi-rae a twentysomething game engineer finds out that the hangover was actually her body being pregnant.

programme.title: Fourth Place
programme.desc: Junho a 11-year-old swimmer always records 4th place at all the swimming contests. His mom is more frustrated than himself in winning as she believes swimming is the only way for him to become successful. One day she manages to hire a personal coach who once was the most promising athlete on the national team. But he trains Junho the only way he knows how to use violence

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Arrowhead
programme.desc: A tech is sprung from prison by a revolutionary leader who promises him an opportunity to save his father from a scheduled execution if he completes a data-stealing mission. But it goes awry, stranding him on a strange alien moon.

programme.title: Outpost 11
programme.desc: Outpost 11 is the story of a group of soldiers stationed on a remote Arctic outpost. One day the warning light goes off unexpectedly and their world is plunged into chaos, as they become prey to an unknown enemy.

programme.title: 7 Below
programme.desc: A group of strangers are trapped in a time warp house where a terrible event transpired exactly 100 years prior.

programme.title: Killing Salazar
programme.desc: Six U.S. agents have to protect a key witness in a major drug case from being murdered by the drug dealers he is going to testify against. Starring Luke Goss and Steven Seagal (2016).

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a young writer reopens an old case, a determined professor races to prove her colleague's innocence - before the truth is buried for good.

programme.title: Nightmare Neighbourhood Moms
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller starring Gina Simms. After a neighbour is killed in a botched robbery, a woman launches a neighbourhood watch - only to uncover secrets far more dangerous than she expected.

programme.title: Secrets That Kill
programme.desc: Jenny is unhappy when her mum Laura returns from a world cruise with a new younger husband.

programme.title: The Wrong Babysitter
programme.desc: A mother must revisit her husband's death in order to rescue her daughter who was kidnapped by her neighbour. Starring Daphne Zuniga (2017)

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh is as devoted to his job as he is at scoring drugs. In the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina, Terence becomes a high-functioning addict who is a deeply intuitive, fearless detective reigning over the beautiful ruins of New Orleans with authority and abandon.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Directed by George Clooney, SUBURBICON is a cold-blooded thriller set in the peaceful streets of suburbia. Here, the picket-fenced homes and manicured lawns look like the perfect place to raise a family...

programme.title: A Dangerous Method
programme.desc: Drawn from true-life events, it takes a glimpse into the turbulent relationships between fledgling psychiatrist Carl Jung, his mentor Sigmund Freud and Sabina Spielrein, the troubled but beautiful young woman who comes between them.

programme.title: The 4th Floor
programme.desc: In this mystery thriller, a woman inherits a rent-controlled apartment and is terrorized by a neighbor. Starring Juliette Lewis, William Hurt and Shelley Duvall.

programme.title: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney runs into her ex Gray and goes on a holiday with him to Bali, but when Derek Lloyd shows up to enlist her to find Parvati's Bowl, she can't resist.

programme.title: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydney's roommate from school is on track of a pendant from her past and enlists Sydney to help find it and catch the killer.

programme.title: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Ultraviolet (2006)
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Little Accidents
programme.desc: Both dramatic and suspenseful, Little Accidents shows the different ways in which people respond to tragedy.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: Eric Lomax was one of thousands of Allied prisoners of war forced to work on the construction of the Thai/Burma railway during WW2. Years later, he met Patti and fell in love. Discovering that the young Japanese officer who haunted her husband was still alive, she faced a terrible decision.

programme.title: The Assistant
programme.desc: An assistant to a powerful movie mogul grows increasingly aware of the questionable behaviour of her boss toward her female peers.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: JANE GOT A GUN is the story of Jane Hammond, a young mother living in a secluded ranch on the vast New Mexico prairie. When her family's life is threatened by a conniving gang of outlaws led by the nefarious John Bishop (McGregor).

programme.title: Beneath Hill 60
programme.desc: A platoon of tunnelers fight to protect a tunnel system packed with enough explosives to change the course of the War.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: Francis 'Pope' Silva is a popular, soon to be retiring casino owner and feared mafia boss. When one of his employees Luke Vaughn desperately needs cash for his daughter's much needed operation...
